programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Depressed over the failure of his marriage, Luke resorts to a self-help tape and suddenly realizes he already knows who his soul mate is; Luke's sister announces that she is getting married; Lorelai stresses over the opening of The Dragonfly Inn.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: All of Stars Hollow turns out for Liz's (Kathleen Wilhoite) Renaissance-themed wedding; Jess walks Liz down the aisle, and Lorelai and Luke share a romantic dance, after which Luke asks Lorelai out on a date.

programme.title: Gilmore Girls
programme.desc: Lorelai invites friends and family to a test run of the opening of the Dragonfly Inn, but preparations for the big day keep her from thinking about Luke's feelings for her.

programme.title: Under the Autumn Moon
programme.desc: While scouting a dude ranch for the outdoor adventure company that employs her, a woman rediscovers her passion for the great outdoors and becomes smitten with the ranch's owner.

programme.title: An Unexpected Valentine
programme.desc: A chance encounter on Valentine's Day brings Hannah and Finn together as they race through New York City to return a lost engagement ring and save one couple's special day.

programme.title: The Perfect Catch
programme.desc: A single mother (Nikki DeLoach) reinvents her struggling diner while spending time with a former high-school boyfriend (Andrew W. Walker) who's now a superstar baseball player.

programme.title: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: After being stood up on a date, a woman writes down her feelings, places the letter in a bottle, and throws it into the ocean. Months later, a fisherman discovers the message and decides to reach out.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Even man-hungry Blanche finds it difficult to tolerate her niece's promiscuous nature.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy needs surgery after injuring herself during tap dancing lessons.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose tries to conceal the fact that she is dating Dr. Jonathan Newman, a little person.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy's becomes involved with a married coworker; her housemates disapprove.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Rose makes a mistake when she allows her boyfriend to spend the night with her.

programme.desc: John-Boy helps a blacksmith (Ned Beatty) write to a woman; Olivia neglects the family to sing in a choir.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy's casual date for the movies decides to unleash her considerable feminine charms on him.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John-Boy must choose between an important date and escorting a dying neighbor to a favorite seaside spot.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: When Barbra Jean signs Reba up for an online dating service, Reba winds up dating a mystery man and spending less time with the family.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: When Reba teams up with Van to invest in real estate, he buys an uninspected house, which prompts her to want out of their partnership.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Cheyenne asks Reba to talk some sense into Van when he stops going to church, but when Reba's efforts fail, she takes her problem straight to the church's handsome new minister (Patrick Fabian).

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Reba is disappointed when her plans for Halloween fall through because everyone in the family has other plans.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: Realizing that his wife has gained quite a bit of weight, Brock consults Reba on how best to handle the delicate situation.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: The family learns that Cheyenne no longer wishes to pursue a career in dentistry after she turns down Brock's offer to intern at his office; Barbara Jean is called for jury duty.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: A miscommunication with her brother, Bryan, sends Barbra Jean to his place for Thanksgiving, while he goes to Reba's.

programme.title: Reba
programme.desc: After observing their constant bickering in the office, Reba and Van's boss insists they see the company's occupational therapist.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the Civil War, America's South is looking to put the past behind it, and finds one path in a growing cultural passion of the North - football. In December 1932, the Southeastern Conference is officially formed.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: Multiple SEC schools claim national titles from the 1930s through the '50s, including LSU with star running back Billy Cannon in 1958, prior to Cannon's epic game-winning punt return against powerhouse Ole Miss a year later.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: In the 1960s, as Georgia Tech leaves the conference and the Civil Rights Movement becomes embedded in the history and image of the region, Bear Bryant, hired in 1958, becomes the face of Alabama - and SEC football.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: As a new decade dawns, quarterbacks Archie Manning, Bert Jones and Condredge Holloway build memorable legacies. Bear Bryant begins a new run of dominance at Alabama, and the rise of television sports transforms the SEC.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: The 1980s begin with Herschel Walker leading Georgia to a national title as a freshman. After Bear Bryant retires in 1982 and passes away four weeks later, control of the SEC is eventually transferred to Pat Dye and Bo Jackson at Auburn.

programme.title: Saturdays In the South: A History of SEC Football
programme.desc: The 1990s bring change, with expansion and the sport's first-ever conference championship game. Florida's Steve Spurrier fashions an era of high-octane offense, and his Gators form a rivalry with Tennessee and QB Peyton Manning.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle

programme.title: 30 for 30

programme.title: SEC Storied

programme.title: SEC Storied

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: Members of the Missouri football team band together after teammate Michael Sam tells them he's gay. The team's acceptance and commitment to each other helps fuel the Tigers' run to the SEC East Championship.

programme.title: SEC Storied

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Mike and Heather beach seine to catch salmon, which they then prepare in a variety of ways to distribute among their community and family.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original-an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. programme.title: The Given Right
programme.desc: Hunting is not a privilege, it is our God given right. Hunt always was, and continues to be integrally woven into the fabric of society. Follow Kenneth Lancaster, Mark Heck and Laden Force as they travel the country, exercising their God given right to hunt.
